SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR FEB-06-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT BATIN, XIOMARA TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT GRECH, KALI S JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF XIOMARA BATIN AND AGAINST KALI S. GRECH IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET BURDEN OF PROOF OF AGREEMENT TO BUY TICKET BEFORE PURCHASE, OR TO MITIGATE BY USE OF INSURANCE OR OTHER TRIP. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 11/27/2013. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT A. MYLES, CLERK JEAN KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 11/27/2013. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRECH, KALI S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATIN, XIOMARA $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,185.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:35am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, Not reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant,Xiomara Batin appears as pro per; Respondent, Kali S. Grech appears as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
Judge Myles goes over the evidence received from Small Claims Division with the parties.
The print out of the judicial rule from the website submitted by appeallant, Ms. Batin, as exhibit has been returned to Ms. Batin.

EXHR (A) flight purchase confiemation
EXHR (B) Kali Grech's letters to Xiomara Batin
EXHR (C) E-mail
EXHA (1) 1st Small Claims filing of Ms. Grech.

10:56am
Matter is submitted. Newly evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Judgment Entered
